name: Undead Hunter Part I
short_description: Undead Hunter is a realistic first-person shooter with a dark and scary atmosphere, created on the Unreal Engine 5. Take up arms and go destroy the undead. From the dead to werewolves and demons. Go to forests and abandoned cities and clear the places from the undead. Can you defeat them all?
detailed_description:
Undead Hunter is a realistic first-person shooter with a dark and scary atmosphere, created on the Unreal Engine 5. Take up arms and go destroy the undead. From the dead to werewolves and demons. Go to forests and abandoned cities and clear the places from the undead. Can you defeat them all?

Main features of the game:

  • Realistic graphics created on Unreal Engine 5.

  • Detailed locations such as a Soviet village, and it is also planned to add a forest camp, an abandoned morgue, swamp places and many others.

  • It is planned to add detailed demons, werewolves, wood goblins and others.

  • Various weapons. Each weapon for the undead, capable of killing them.

  • It is planned to add a survival mode, where you will destroy the undead in the arena until death.

  • It is planned to add a drawing of a powerful weapon in each location, capable of killing all evil spirits. When all the drawings are collected, the weapon will be available.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Ukrainian
